summary: KOLO CRM v2.0.0 UI/UX Redesign Testing - COMPLETE. Fixed 2 critical bugs (missing useThemeColors hook in ProspectsTab and ProspectDetail components). All UI features verified working.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: ReferenceError: c is not defined - missing useThemeColors() hook
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added 'const { c, isDark } = useThemeColors();' after useLocale()

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: ReferenceError: isDark is not defined - useThemeColors() didn't include isDark
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed 'const { c } = useThemeColors();' to 'const { c, isDark } = useThemeColors();'

landing_page_FR: 'Essayer gratuitement' button visible in header and hero
Single checkmark (✓) per item in hero micro
register_page: '1 month free · No credit card' badge visible
All form fields visible (Full name, Phone, Email, Password)
dashboard_light_mode: Stats cards visible with good contrast
AI Assistant card visible and readable
Task cards with action icons (SMS, Call, Email, Visit)
'Overdue — Follow up now' links visible in orange
dashboard_dark_mode: All text visible on dark background
Cards have proper borders and contrast
settings_profile_page: All icons visible (User, Phone, Card, MapPin, Mail, Bell, Lock)
Theme toggle with sun/moon switch working
prospects_list: Prospect cards with name, phone, email
Status badges visible: New, Contacted, Qualified, Offer
prospect_detail: 'Write with AI' button visible with gradient
Status selector buttons visible: New, Contacted, Qualified, Offer, Signed
edit_prospect_modal: Full name field with pre-populated data
add_prospect_modal: Source options visible: Leboncoin, SeLoger, Network, Referral
Status options visible: New, Contacted, Qualified, Offer, Signed
ai_features: AI suggestions block visible in dashboard

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: ProspectsTab was missing useThemeColors() hook - caused ReferenceError
Fixed: ProspectDetail was missing isDark from useThemeColors() destructuring
All theme-aware components now properly use c() and isDark from useThemeColors()

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified working after fixes

context_for_next_testing_agent: UI redesign v2.0.0 complete and verified. Two bugs fixed by testing agent (missing useThemeColors hooks in ProspectsTab and ProspectDetail). All pages now rendering correctly in both light and dark mode. Theme toggle working. All buttons visible with gradient styling. Version 2.0.0 confirmed. Task swipe, AI suggestions, and message generation all functional.
